recent_calls.summary: The user called to cancel their appointment for Wednesday. The agent acknowledged the cancellation and informed the user that the team would confirm the cancellation on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

Lauren called after hours to inquire about the plumber's scheduled arrival time for tomorrow. The agent noted her request and informed her that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm the details. Lauren indicated she was available anytime and had no further questions.

The user called Budget's after-hours service expressing interest in making a purchase. The agent introduced herself and asked for more details to ensure the team follows up on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without further details from the user.

The user called after hours requesting immediate AC service. The agent explained that transfers and dispatches cannot be done after hours but offered to take the user's information for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without the user providing further details.

The user, Kyoth Irmayi, called to report an urgent air conditioning repair issue and requested to know when the service would be provided. The agent documented the emergency and escalated the request, informing the user that the team will contact them on the next business day since it was after hours. The call ended with the user satisfied that their request was noted and will be addressed promptly.

The user, Tiffany Wallewa, called to schedule a new cooling service appointment for her home at 3109 Maybell Drive, Saint Louis, Missouri. She requested a weekday morning appointment before twelve and declined to provide an email. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that someone from the team would follow up shortly, including information about home maintenance programs, which Tiffany expressed interest in.

The user, Donald Fedorko, called on behalf of his sister-in-law Hannah Braheny to request a callback regarding an air conditioning issue under warranty. He provided contact details, service address, and requested an option to replace the unit rather than just fix the leak. The agent confirmed all details, noted the preferred callback time, and the user expressed interest in maintenance programs and gave positive feedback on the call experience.

James called after hours to inquire about the arrival time of a technician for his air conditioner repair scheduled for the next day. The agent confirmed the urgent nature of the request due to high temperatures in his home and documented the service address and contact information. The agent assured James that the request was marked as a priority and that the team would follow up the next business day.

The user called after hours and decided to call back in the morning instead of proceeding with the service. The agent offered to take information for a follow-up, but the user did not continue the conversation.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the service address ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging further.
The call was very brief with the agent introducing herself but no further conversation took place before the user hung up.

The user, Judith, called to inquire about service time for the next day but ended the call abruptly without providing further details or confirming the service. The agent attempted to assist but the user declined to continue the conversation.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and no further conversation from the user before the call ended.

The user, Hannah, responded to an after-hours call from Budget and inquired about a previous call attempt. The conversation was somewhat unclear due to unintelligible audio, and the user mentioned being busy and driving, but no clear resolution or service request was made.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person.

Robin called to schedule an AC repair under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent collected the dispatch number and confirmed the request for service as soon as possible today, informing Robin that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will reach out shortly. Robin declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to speak with an operator, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with an operator. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to inquire about service availability and initially provided a ZIP code where service was not offered. After providing a second ZIP code, the user requested to speak with Nick Marchesno but the call ended abruptly without further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to report that the outside AC unit fan is not working and making noise. The agent collected the necessary details, confirmed the service request through American Home Shield without a dispatch number, and assured the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them soon. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the AI assistant.

The user called and asked if the service was AI-based. The agent confirmed and explained that she is a virtual assistant who would help start the request and pass it to the team. The call ended shortly after without further information exchange.

The user, a delivery person, informed the agent about two packages being dropped off and an open door downstairs, mentioning that another delivery person named Ferguson was arriving with more items. The agent acknowledged the information and assured the user that the team would be informed. The call ended shortly after without further issues.

The user called to inform that the boiler does not need to be moved and requested that Rich send the estimate by tomorrow to their email. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to verify the completion date of a specific work order associated with dispatch number 48806599. The agent informed the user that they do not have direct access to dispatch records but will forward the request to the team for follow-up. The user provided a contact number for the team to reach out with the information.

The user, Stefan from American Home Shield, called to discuss dispatch number 48806599 and provided the service address ZIP code 63017. The call ended shortly after the user identified themselves and did not proceed further.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect her with a live agent for further assistance. The call was then successfully transferred to another number for continued support.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called Budget and was asked for their service address ZIP code but was unable to provide it. The user requested to be transferred to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another representative.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to schedule a plumbing walk-through for their whole house plan. The agent attempted to clarify details but faced repeated unclear responses from the user regarding their role at the residence. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The call ended shortly after the transfer was successful.

Christine from Lennox called to inquire about the receiving hours for a delivery in Bridgeton, Missouri. The agent provided the receiving hours and confirmed the ZIP code for the delivery location. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.
The user expressed dissatisfaction and requested to speak with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Eve from American Home Shield, called to follow up on a dispatch regarding an AC unit repair or replacement. The agent collected the dispatch number, service address, contact number, and user details before transferring the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user called and mentioned receiving a callback from a representative. The agent acknowledged this and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent initiated the call by asking the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The agent confirmed Johnnie King's identity and phone number, then informed him of a scheduled appointment with technician Devon at 11 AM. The user acknowledged the information and ended the call without further questions.
The user called and provided their ZIP code, then requested to speak to a live agent. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user called to follow up on a scheduled appointment and requested to speak to a live agent. The call ended abruptly after the user pressed a digit, indicating a possible transfer or hold.

Jerry Paul called to request an inspection and repair estimate for an AC unit that is running but not cooling at 126 South Overbrook Drive, Saint Charles. The agent collected detailed contact information and clarified Jerry's role as leading a home repair ministry called Hammerheads. The agent informed Jerry that no appointment slots were currently available but assured that the team would contact Glynnis directly to schedule and that Jerry wanted to be informed if the cost exceeds $300 before any work is done.
The user called to speak with someone about a follow-up concern. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Robin Stovall called to request urgent air conditioning service through American Home Shield due to the system blowing heat and not cooling, which is critical because of Robin's health condition. The agent confirmed the details and assured that someone from the team would contact Robin shortly to schedule the earliest possible appointment today. Robin declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to provide positive feedback about a recent service experience, praising the technician's politeness, promptness, and efficiency. The agent acknowledged the feedback and proceeded to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to speak with a specific representative they had previously spoken with. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
